name: Rice Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
2. Let the milk stand for about 30 minutes, then without shaking, pour it into another container, leaving most of the sediment in the first container.
3. This yields about 4-4/12 cups of rice milk.
4. When using cold water or refrigerated rice, the results may not be as good. It is best to use warm water and warm rice (you can reheat leftovers, but freshly made is best). Allowing it to set for longer than 30 minutes (overnight) does not make a difference.
